title: Flashback Fixes
description:
An addon to Flashback 1.21.11 that patches bugs.

Currently fixes the reset GUI bug that happens on Lunar Client and a crash that occurs when previewing keyframes on a cropped aspect ratio
body:
An small addon to Flashback 1.21.11 0.39.5 that patches bugs.

Current fixes:
- Lunar Client GUI layout not saving
- Crash that occurs when previewing keyframes on a cropped aspect ratio
- Network protocol error from replayed mod custom payloads
